section1.title: Introduction

section3.title: Services

list.item2: Music production and advertising jingle creation

section4.title: Service Agreements
section4.p1: All services provided by Crixium Digital are subject to a separate service agreement which will outline the specific deliverables, timelines, payments, and other terms specific to that particular project. These agreements shall be considered part of these Terms and Conditions.

section5.title: Payments

section7.title: Governing Law
section7.p1: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws and any dispute related to these terms and conditions shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the local courts.

section8.title: Changes to Terms
section8.p1: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material we will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect.
